# chronosphere Provider





<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `org` (String) Chronosphere organization name (the subdomain of `<org>.chronosphere.io`). Falls back to the `CHRONOSPHERE_ORG` or `CHRONOSPHERE_ORG_NAME` environment variables.

### Optional

- `api_token` (String, Sensitive) API token used to authenticate against the Chronosphere API. Treat as a secret. Falls back to the `CHRONOSPHERE_API_TOKEN` environment variable.
- `disable_dryrun` (Boolean) Disable the dry-run validation step that runs before every apply. Falls back to the `CHRONOSPHERE_DRY_RUN_VALIDATION_DISABLED` environment variable (set to `1` to disable).
- `entity_namespace` (String) Optional namespace prefix applied to entity slugs managed by this provider instance, so multiple Terraform configurations can coexist in one Chronosphere org. Falls back to the `CHRONOSPHERE_ENTITY_NAMESPACE` environment variable.
- `unstable` (Boolean) Opt into resources and behaviors backed by Chronosphere's unstable config API. Subject to breaking change without notice. Falls back to the `CHRONOSPHERE_UNSTABLE` environment variable (set to `1` to enable).
